calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-25-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-25-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Linda Forster, CSR #13286.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Target National Bank.
No appearance by defendant David Chow.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on May 23, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Target National Bank, and against defendant David Chow as follows:

Damages/Principal - $10,856.55.
Attorney's Fees - Waived.
Costs - $430.00, for a total of $11,286.55.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than August 28, 2008.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2008 Set For Trial On Aug-25-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
